headlines.title: Zohran Mamdani’s clout, a double Trump endorsement and more on the line in Tuesday’s primaries
headlines.description: The parties will also set up a handful of key House battleground races as voters in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah pick nominees.

headlines.title: Send your midterm elections questions for Steve Kornacki
headlines.description: Steve Kornacki is getting ready for another night at the Big Board, where he’ll break down primary election results in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah on Tuesday

headlines.title: Noruega sella boleto a dieciseisavos tras vencer a Senegal
headlines.description: En un partidazo y con doblete de Erling Haaland, el seleccionado noruego supera a Senegal y suma su segunda victoria consecutiva.

headlines.title: Lionel Messi breaks record for most career World Cup goals
headlines.description: Lionel Messi has broken the record for the most career goals at the World Cup by scoring in Argentina's game against Austria.

headlines.title: Mbappé aprovecha grave error de Irak y llega a 16 goles en Copas del Mundo
headlines.description: ¡Histórico! Mbappé igualó la marca de Miroslav Klose y llegó a 16 goles en mundiales. El delantero de Francia simplemente tuvo que empujar el balón a las redes, luego de que Irak perdiera el esférico al intentar salir jugando dentro de su área.

headlines.title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match
headlines.description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks
headlines.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: El Análisis Experto es para la sublime actuación de Lionel Messi
headlines.description: Batistuta asegura que no es normal lo que hace Messi, mientras que Valdano asegura que el diez ya se apoderó del Mundial.

headlines.title: Heroico: Argelia remonta ante Jordania y enciende el sueño por avanzar a los 16avos del Mundial 2026
headlines.description: Los "Zorros del Desierto" lo creyeron hasta el final, le dieron la vuelta al marcador y se afianzaron en el tercer lugar del Grupo J con tres puntos, por lo que se jugarán la vida en la última jornada; mientras que los asiáticos quedaron eliminados.
